parameters: Uh, I just started my new job as a merchant! I'm selling Spirit Soul
Stones for ten iru apiece! Want one?
Ah! I got the price wrong!
I'm the leader! I have to work hard and provide for the others!
That's right! I'll work all night long for them! I bet that'll make
You have to get proper rest!
You have to get proper rest!
I'll work hard as the leader!
Hup! Hup! Farmwork really gets your muscles going!
There's a treasure chest. Take what's inside?
This chest has my treasure inside it!
The door to the next floor is opened.
We should promote and reward proper behavior!
We should promote and reward proper behavior!
We should promote and reward proper behavior, even if it costs us!
